analysis.reasoning: The tweet highlights EU benefits to citizens (jobs, standards, fair trade) and frames the EU as leading in climate-friendly growth and international trade, which aligns with EU3 (useful for citizens), EU4 (avant-garde regulation on standards/green tech), EU5 (global champion of fair causes), and EU6 (contributes to a better world).
